infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MedMinder uses your camera to scan and read your prescription so it can set up medication reminders automatically. The image is processed entirely on your device and is never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MedMinder accesses your photo library so you can select a photo of your prescription. The image is processed on-device and is never uploaded.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: MedMinder can add your dose times to your calendar so you have a second reminder alongside in-app notifications.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: MedMinder can add your dose times to your calendar so you have a second reminder alongside in-app notifications.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: MedMinder uses Face ID to keep your medication information private.

plugins.photosPermission: MedMinder accesses your photo library so you can select a photo of your prescription. The image is processed on-device and is never uploaded.

plugins.calendarPermission: MedMinder can add your dose times to your calendar so you have a second reminder alongside in-app notifications.
